description_long: This shotgun features a streamlined, modern design with a predominantly dark metallic finish and subtle blue accents along the upper receiver and barrel. The body is angular and sleek, with a pronounced, integrated fore-end and a compact, ergonomic grip. The barrel appears to be a single, elongated tube with a smooth exterior, lacking visible ribbing or venting. The stock is minimalistic, merging seamlessly with the receiver, and does not extend into a traditional full stock. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. Overall, the shotgun exudes a tactical, futuristic aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a dark metallic body, blue highlights, and a compact, ergonomic design. It features a single smooth barrel and a minimalistic stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated barrel, blue upper accents, and integrated grip with a streamlined body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the single barrel opening and the narrow, symmetrical profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the barrel and compact grip.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the minimalistic stock and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth exterior with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
